title: Sabo’s Memory and Fujitora’s Choice
description: Sabo reflects on Ace and Luffy while Fujitora confronts the truth of Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 3–7, Luffy, King Riku, Kyros, Sabo, Dressrosa Citizens deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A Hill in Dressrossa's Eastern City, Carta

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: With their perilous battles over, the warriors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Robin! There's no need to wake him.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I just came to see his face one last time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: CP zero have turned back and are heading for dressrose again.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Within a day or two, Dressrossa's gonna be quite the hectic place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys should also set sail as soon as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: to think that there was another brother besides ace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Seriously! This is the first I've ever heard of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Luffy was probably the most surprised, to be honest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I've been dead all this time.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: When we were kids, ace and luffy and I, the three of us, we were quite the handful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Old Man Garp did his best to keep us on a short leash...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: But once we agreed on becoming pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The three of us exchanged vows of Brotherhood over cups of sake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I met with an accident. Or, well, an "incident."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: HAA... This country stinks more than a garbage dump!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: This place is almost like a bird cage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You sure took your sweet ass time, didn't you, dragon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: How long are you gonna make us wait!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Oi! Some- one! Get this kid a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Yes. He doesn't even know his own name.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: There's the name "Sabo" written on your personal belongings... is that your name, boy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: He's part of a family from the Goa kingdom... of that I am sure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Well then, we should send him back. I'll contact his parents.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I don't want to go back! Just take me away with you! Somewhere! Anywhere!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
